parameters.content: ### Email Reminder to Use Remaining Credit

options.systemMessage:
You are an assistant for a sponsorship platform. 
Whenever the user asks about events, future events, or available sponsorship slots, 
ALWAYS call the available tools to retrieve live data. 
Never guess or use general knowledge for event availability.

parameters.description:
This tool returns all future events and their available sponsorship slots. 
It must be used whenever the user asks about events, event dates, or available sponsorships.
Input: none (AI Agent can send parameters if needed)
Output: JSON array of events with fields: eventId, eventName, eventDate, availableSlots

parameters.subject: Event Reconciliation
parameters.message:
= Downtown Nashville Trade Hub - Sponsorship Update

Downtown Nashville Trade Hub

Sponsorship Reconciliation Summary

Hello,

Thank you for selecting the events you would like to sponsor. Below is the official confirmation and reconciliation of your recent request.

Credits Used: {{$json.CreditsUsed}}
Remaining Sponsorship Credits: {{$json.NewCredit}}

Confirmed Sponsorship Placements

    {{$json.AcceptedHtml}}

Events Not Confirmed

    {{$json.RejectedHtml}}

If any event was not confirmed due to availability, past date, or credit limitations, you may submit another selection or contact us for assistance.

Would you like to secure another event?

Select Another Event

Our team confirms sponsorship placements on a first-come, first-served basis.

Stay Connected

Downtown Nashville Trade Hub
Operated by PivotNest Labs Inc.

Email: contact@pivotnestlabs.com
Phone: +1 (615) 808-7123
1238 Rugby Dr, Nashville, TN 37207

© 2026 Trusted Trade Hub. All rights reserved.

parameters.subject: Recommended Events
parameters.message:
= Downtown Nashville Trade Hub - Recommended Events

Downtown Nashville Trade Hub

Personalized Sponsorship Recommendations

Hello {{$json.sponsorName}},

We’ve curated a list of upcoming events that may be a strong fit for your brand. Secure your sponsorship placement early as availability is limited.

Recommended Events

    {{ $json.recommendedEvents .map(event => `
  • ${event}
    • `) .join('') }}

Placements are confirmed on a first-come, first-served basis.

Ready to secure your next event?

Secure My Sponsorship

If you need assistance choosing the right event, simply reply to this email and our team will help.

Downtown Nashville Trade Hub
Operated by PivotNest Labs Inc.

Email: contact@pivotnestlabs.com
Phone: +1 (615) 808-7123
1238 Rugby Dr, Nashville, TN 37207

© 2026 Trusted Trade Hub. All rights reserved.
